title: Dichrotrichum elongatum
taxonomy: Dichrotrichum elongatum is a species of moss in the family Dicranaceae. It belongs to the division Bryophyta, a group of non-vascular plants. This plant is further classified into the class Bryopsida and the order Dicranales. The family Dicranaceae is a part of the order Dicranales and is commonly known as the dicranoid mosses. The classification of Dichrotrichum elongatum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
